title: Domain State Schema
description: Schema for validating persistent player domain states.

domain_state_id.description: Unique identifier for this domain state instance.

owner_player_id.description: The player ID who owns this domain.

content_pack_id.description: The ID of the content pack this domain belongs to.

domain_archetype.description: The archetype of this domain (e.g., tower_domain, swamp_domain).

conquered.description: True if the domain has been conquered by the owner.

dashboard_unlocked.description: True if the domain dashboard is unlocked for owner interaction.

domain_level.description: The current level of the domain.

active_modifiers.description: List of active modifiers affecting the domain.

operational_costs.description: Ongoing costs to maintain the domain.

invasion_history.description: History of invasion attempts and outcomes.

forbidden_flags.description: Flags to ensure domain integrity and fair play.

playability_failure.description: Must be false. Domain should not be unplayable.

owner_immunity.description: Must be false. Owner is not immune to domain effects.

impossible_layout.description: Must be false. Domain layout should not be impossible.
